body.title: [sprint] Repoint UU ebooks paths off vestigial ~/.unseen_university/akien symlink -> /media/akien/onedrive
body.intention: I intend that UU code addresses the OneDrive ebooks library by its canonical /media/akien/onedrive path, so the vestigial ~/.unseen_university/akien/{onedrive,AkiensWorld} symlink bridges can be removed without breaking reader/igor.
body.description:
**Problem:** Akien fully sorted ~/.unseen_university/akien/ (2026-07-01) and the `onedrive`/`AkiensWorld` entries there are VESTIGIAL symlinks he made early on (before the canonical /media/akien/... paths were known). Three UU-code sites still address the ebooks library through the onedrive symlink; they must move to /media so the symlinks can be removed. (Calibre itself is a Windows portable app on the OneDrive share and is unaffected by the Linux symlink; `unseen_university/devices/calibre/device.py` already uses /media.) OLD and NEW resolve to the SAME physical location (verified), so this is behavior-preserving. **Proposed shape:** repoint the prefix `~/.unseen_university/akien/onedrive` -> `/media/akien/onedrive`, preserving the rest of each path exactly: (1) reader/uri.py:44 `_DEFAULT_CALIBRE_PATH` default; (2) igor/paths.py Linux branch (line ~220 `return self._runtime / 'akien' / 'onedrive' / ...`) + the docstring at ~198; (3) igor/tools/learner.py:1511 `_CALIBRE_DB` hardcoded constant. Then remove the two vestigial symlinks. **Affected files:** unseen_university/devices/reader/uri.py, unseen_university/devices/igor/paths.py, unseen_university/devices/igor/tools/learner.py. **Design rules:** NO SQLITE; no live keys; portable (EBOOKS_ROOT/CALIBRE_LIBRARY_PATH env overrides remain the first-choice). **Scope boundary:** IN: the 3 path repoints + remove the 2 vestigial symlinks. OUT: calibre/device.py's `Calibre Library` vs `Calibre Portable/Calibre Library` example-path discrepancy (noticed, separate — not symlink-related); KDE recent-files/places bookmarks (self-heal). **Test plan (hermetic red->green):** assert on Linux that IgorPaths.ebooks_root, reader._DEFAULT_CALIBRE_PATH, and learner._CALIBRE_DB all contain `/media/akien/onedrive/AkiensMedia/Ebooks` and NONE contain `.unseen_university/akien/onedrive`. **Completion criteria:** grep shows ZERO `.unseen_university/akien/onedrive` refs in unseen_university/**; the 3 paths resolve under /media (metadata.db present there — verified); both vestigial symlinks removed; test green.

## Pre-computed constraints (auto-stamped at add time)
[hard_block] ⛔ NO SQLITE. EVER. POSTGRES OR FLAT-FILE ONLY. See banner at top of this file. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[hard_block] Log every state change and every interface crossing. State changes: ticket status — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] No TheIgors imports. UnseenUniversity must be portable without TheIgors present. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] No live keys or passwords in source. `.env` is gitignored. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] `pip install -e .` must succeed at all times (even with empty stubs). — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] Canonical dev-process memory — one home, no exceptions. Every dev-process artifact — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] device.py and shim.py are the design center. Every component inherits from — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] `~/.unseen_university/logs/<device>/<stream>/` is the canonical log hierarchy — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] Every ticket closes proven, or declares itself unproven — no discriminator. A ticket that — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
…and 39 more (lower-severity or capped) — query constraints_get for the full set
